inputs.description: High-drama reality TV storyboard set in 'The Vault', a pastel mint-green brutalist containment center. Symmetrical Wes Anderson framing, deadpan mood. Characters: Anthropomorphic Pitcher Plant femme fatale with fleshy, dripping O'Keeffe-style botanical cleavage, and a glamorous Orchid. 4 beats: 1. Hypnotic languid seduction on a mustard velvet couch. 2. Uncomfortably intimate macro-shot of dripping nectar. 3. Stark UV/thermal biometric confessional showing parasitic life-drain. 4. Cryogenic elimination in frosted glass.

story.title: The Vault: Botanical Betrayal
story.logline: In a pastel brutalist reality show, a seductive pitcher plant eliminates her glamorous orchid rival through parasitic betrayal.

anchors.style: Symmetrical Wes Anderson framing, high-drama reality TV aesthetic, deadpan mood, sharp studio lighting with cinematic shadows, 35mm film grain, striking minimalist composition
anchors.world: The Vault, a pastel mint-green brutalist containment center, rigid geometric concrete structures, stark clinical corridors, oppressive yet highly stylized
anchors.palette: Pastel mint-green, mustard yellow, fleshy pinks, deep ultraviolet highlights, stark white

inputs.prompt: cinematic editorial, anthropomorphic Pitcher Plant femme fatale in a corseted pastel dress, deep voluptuous fleshy botanical clefts, dripping glowing nectar, deadpan expression, sitting perfectly centered on a mustard velvet couch, pastel mint-green brutalist room, obsessive symmetry, Wes Anderson style

cinematic ultraviolet thermal vision reality tv confessional shot, glowing neon heat signatures revealing internal toxic nutrient siphoning of a glamorous plant, high fashion meets stark medical imaging, dramatic reality tv lighting

cinematic slow-motion, highly symmetrical planar angle, an anthropomorphic Pitcher Plant femme fatale with fleshy botanical cleavage dripping thick bioluminescent nectar, she stares deadpan into the camera with languid hypnotic micro-movements, pastel brutalist background

story.title: The Vault: Botanical Betrayal
story.logline: In a pastel brutalist reality show, a seductive pitcher plant eliminates her glamorous orchid rival through parasitic betrayal.

anchors.style: Symmetrical Wes Anderson framing, high-drama reality TV aesthetic, deadpan mood, sharp studio lighting with cinematic shadows, 35mm film grain, striking minimalist composition
anchors.world: The Vault, a pastel mint-green brutalist containment center, rigid geometric concrete structures, stark clinical corridors, oppressive yet highly stylized
anchors.palette: Pastel mint-green, mustard yellow, fleshy pinks, deep ultraviolet highlights, stark white

characters.name: Nepenthes
characters.anchors: Anthropomorphic Pitcher Plant femme fatale, sleek structured botanical gown, fleshy dripping O'Keeffe-style botanical cleavage, heavy-lidded seductive eyes, glossy predatory textures, emerald and crimson hues

characters.name: Orchid
characters.anchors: Glamorous anthropomorphic Orchid, fragile and elegant, wearing delicate ruffled petals like haute couture, pristine white and magenta accents, anxious expression, delicate stems

beats.purpose: Establish the awkward, stylized reality TV tension between the two rivals.
beats.prompt: Wide perfectly symmetrical shot of {{pitcher}} lounging languidly next to {{orchid}} on a stark mustard velvet couch. {{world}}. The mood is thick with hypnotic seduction as both stare deadpan directly into the lens. {{palette}}. {{style}}.

beats.purpose: Highlight the predatory, sensual nature of the Pitcher Plant.
beats.prompt: Uncomfortably intimate macro-shot focusing on the chest of {{pitcher}}, thick translucent nectar dripping slowly from a fleshy botanical fold. The background is a soft bokeh blur of the mint-green brutalist walls. {{style}}.

beats.purpose: Reveal the hidden parasitic betrayal through a stylized biometric lens.
beats.prompt: Stark reality TV confessional shot framed in glowing UV and thermal imaging. {{pitcher}}'s roots are visibly wrapped around the shivering silhouette of {{orchid}}, actively draining vibrant glowing energy. High contrast parasitic life-drain revealed. {{world}}. {{style}}.

beats.purpose: Show the final, cold elimination of the Orchid.
beats.prompt: Medium static shot of {{orchid}} trapped inside a cylindrical cryogenic chamber of frosted glass. Mint-green fog billows out symmetrically. {{pitcher}} stands perfectly centered in the foreground, looking back over her shoulder with a remorseless deadpan stare. {{world}}. {{style}}.

cinematic ultraviolet thermal vision reality tv confessional shot, glowing neon heat signatures revealing internal toxic nutrient siphoning of a glamorous plant, high fashion meets stark medical imaging, dramatic reality tv lighting

cinematic slow-motion, highly symmetrical planar angle, an anthropomorphic Pitcher Plant femme fatale with fleshy botanical cleavage dripping thick bioluminescent nectar, she stares deadpan into the camera with languid hypnotic micro-movements, pastel brutalist background
